nasb.text: Now an old prophet was living in Bethel; and his sons came and told him all the deeds which the man of God had done that day in Bethel; the words which he had spoken to the king, these also they related to their father.

esv.text: Now an old prophet lived in Bethel. And his sons came and told him all that the man of God had done that day in Bethel. They also told to their father the words that he had spoken to the king.

cnv.text: 有一個老先知住在伯特利，他的兒子們來告訴他，那一天神人在伯特利所行的一切事。他們也把他對王所說的話，都告訴了他們的父親。

ccb.text: 在伯特利住着一位老先知，他儿子们把上帝的仆人那天所行的事和对王所说的话告诉了他。
